nodes.title: Beyer Boys Names The PM Group Agency of Record
Utilizing the Warm and Fuzzy Feelings of Nostalgia this Holiday Season

pageContext.content:
The spring rains finally stopped and have been replaced with a surging summer heat which is no surprise to Texans. And that leads to only one thing for many homeowners, an AC unit that stops cooling their homes.
 
Whether you just need a small repair to get your system back in service OR it’s time to replace the AC unit you’ve had for many years…we highly A&E Air Conditioning to get the job done right. They will be there when they say they will and they send out repair technicians, NOT SALESMAN like many other AC repair companies.
 
A&E Air Conditioning is a family-owned business that stands behind their work 100%. If it’s not right, they’ll make it right!
 
A&E Air Conditioning has hired The PM Group to develop a new marketing campaign for TV and radio advertising, along with a completely redesigned website. The PM Group is proud to partner with A&E, who has been serving the San Antonio community and the surrounding areas since 1992. A&E prides themselves on serving their customers with honesty and integrity. They never send a salesman when a customer calls, they send a repairman to get the job done. This is what sets A&E Air Conditioning apart from the others; A&E will never try to sell you something you don’t need.
Check out their new TV commercial and you’ll know why you can trust A&E Air Conditioning!
 

A&E Magician

A&E Air conditioning commercial 2015 created by The PM Group

 
Also, be sure to check out the completely redesigned new website at www.ae4cool.com! A&E’s commitment to professionalism really shines through.
 
-Bob Wills
